system.biography:
Age: 18

Birthday: 7 Halane 702

Culture: Feudal

Social Class: Unguilded

Sibling Rank: 3rd of 7

Estrangement: Popular

Clanhead: Father's cousin

 

Kevan is the 3rd son of a vassal of the Frykals, holders of Bonaven manor in Navintas Hundred. Kevan fancies himself a musician and a poet. His father is ecstatic that he has finally done something that he (the father) can tell his friends about. His clan head is his father’s cousin. Kevan is popular with the clan head, who openly hopes that Kevan’s contact with the Indamas will yield benefits for the entire clan. Kevan is armored as a Medium Knight, with an average monthly allowance.

prototypeToken.name: Feudal Guardsman, Light - Houla of Wesaldim
